off-l-pinned.name: Pinned
off-l-pinned.notes: A compact tactical puzzle with blocked lines and tempo traps.

off-l-break-line.name: Break the Line
off-l-break-line.notes: Punch through the central road before the enemy can consolidate.

off-l-high-ground.name: High Ground
off-l-high-ground.notes: Take the ridge without losing the king.

off-l-hold-bridge.name: Hold the Bridge
off-l-hold-bridge.notes: Survive the assault until reinforcements arrive.

off-l-fortress-gate.name: Fortress Gate
off-l-fortress-gate.notes: Enemy pieces begin from elevated stone ground.

off-l-river-crossing.name: River Crossing
off-l-river-crossing.notes: Cross the river and clear the island. Watch enemy range over the bridges.
